title: Buy The Crash With 2 Fat Dividends

title: ONEOK's Fat 5.8% Yield Supports Outperforming Total Returns
text: In this article, I start by explaining why high-yield stocks are able to outperform the market - especially in times of rising rates. ONEOK is one of my favorite high-yield stocks, as it benefits from strong and rising free cash flow and an increasingly healthy balance sheet.

title: 2 Risky Energy Picks That Could Pay Off
